Headline: #20 Madison Temporary Reroute near Madison/Campbell
ShortDescription: 20 Madison  buses temp. rerouted : due to,  street blockage near Madison/Campbell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#20 Madison  buses temp. rerouted : due to,  street blockage near Madison/Campbell.

Westbound buses will operate via Madison, Western, Washington, California and Madison including the normal route streets.

Eastbound buses will operate via Madison, California, Warren, Western and Madison

Allow extra travel time.
